ranking_rule: repo-owned contradiction outranks runtime blockers only if proven
top-level command truth outranks downstream reserve-readiness posture
unstable read-surface-local symptoms do not outrank stable top-level truth
rotation OK does not waive reserve-first or top-level truth blockers

A.name: top_level_runtime_truth_regression
basis: NEXT_CONTOUR_CANON_PLAN: if runtime truth is not green enough, repair runtime truth first

B.name: reserve_readiness_degraded
basis: accounts list reserve backend `k-gpt-pro` exists but is down/quota

D.name: repo_owned_read_surface_contradiction
basis: no canon/runtime contradiction proven from clean packet set
